{{Infobox website
| name = Evolution.faith
| url = https://evolution.faith
| registration = Optional {{Efn|most features not implemented yet}}
}} Evolution.faith is a website dedicated to explaining [[Lifeism]] to a lay audience. It has an intended ninth grade reading level for its content.

It contrasts with this wiki which is aimed at a clerical audience and is at a much higher reading level

in the future it will host more content and be more of a hub than it currently is, likely including the [[Lifeism Wiki]]

== References ==
[[Category:Evolutionist Online Infrastructure]]
[[sn:Evolution.faith]]<references group="lower-alpha"/>
<references group="note"/>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
